top_weaknesses.issue: Two paragraphs over 80 words ('This was tolerable...' = 92 words; 'These are not allegations...' = 87 words) — wall on mobile
top_weaknesses.fix: Split each at the natural pivot ('AI does not cycle in decades.' / 'By the time a court could order...')

top_weaknesses.issue: First sentence under 'The political path...' H2 echoes the H2 verbatim, wastes the slot
top_weaknesses.fix: Open the paragraph with new information, not a restatement of the header

top_weaknesses.issue: Policy bullets and conclusion drift toward whitepaper voice; loses the punchy clock-metaphor energy of the lede
top_weaknesses.fix: End on a sharper concrete image (a la 'a million Excel files') instead of civic-textbook closer

top_weaknesses.issue: First 155 chars of snippet are DOJ/Google timing only — AI compounding thesis doesn't surface in preview window
top_weaknesses.fix: Tighten lede so 'AI compounds' lands inside first 155 chars

consensus_summary: Strong thesis with a memorable clock metaphor; all four personas would read or share it. Two long paragraphs and a slightly think-tanky policy section are the only things keeping it from a clean 9.
